text: Self-install support: teach auto-mergeinstall to handle the autoharness workspace — (1) relax the workspace_path != autoharness_home guard in install-harness Step 1.0 when target is autoharness itself, (2) add workspace profile signal (e.g. distribution.global_agents_dir) that tells installer to place workflow agents in .github/local-agents/ instead of .github/agents/ when the target distributes agents globally, (3) ensure pyproject.toml force-include only maps .github/agents/ (not local-agents/) so workflow agents never leak into the wheel, (4) configure .vscode/settings.json chat.agentFilesLocations to include both directories. Infrastructure already partially implemented: pyproject.toml updated, .vscode/settings.json updated, .github/local-agents/ created with placeholder stage/ship agents.
